_note: Pattern sweep across sibling targets. Demonstrates the graph payoff: creates related_to edges and a new finding on a sibling. {{sibling_target_id}} / {{sibling_name}} come from the real project's other targets via TaskContext.

findings.title: Same {{sink|strcpy}} sink pattern in {{sibling_name|libupnp.so}}
findings.summary: The unbounded {{sink|strcpy}} pattern from the seed finding also appears in {{sibling_name|libupnp.so}}'s SSDP parser.
findings.reasoning: Signature match on the copy-into-fixed-buffer shape, confirmed by inspecting the sibling's decompilation. Same exploit primitive likely applies.
